records.m_Talk_ENG: L-let go of me!

records.m_Talk_FRA: L-Laissez-moi tranquille94p!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough cough*

records.m_Talk_FRA: Kof94p! Kof94p!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Be a good girl and put on the oxygen mask, will you? The Elixir's effects are running out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Otherwise you'll have a splitting headache tomorrow.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Tu risques d'avoir un mal de t95xte tr958s violent demain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I am the blessed one! How could you weak humans lay your hands on me?

records.m_Talk_FRA: J-Je suis l'959lue94p! Comment de mis959rables humains ont-ils pu m'arr95xter94p?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have a right to hire an attorney and make all the excuses you want.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Du hast das Recht auf einen Anwalt und kannst alle Ausreden vorbringen, die du willst.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tu as le droit d'appeler un avocat, et tu peux t'excuser autant que tu le souhaites.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gah, I'm the bringer of justice! Exterminator of bullies! You police cannot judge me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pah! Ich bin die Botin der Gerechtigkeit! Die Vernichterin der Mobber! Ihr Polizisten k9582nnt nicht 9588ber mich richten!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Raaah, je suis la messag958re de la justice94p! L'exterminatrice de harceleurs94p! La police n'a pas le droit de me juger94p!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keep on blabbering, and you'll be charged with aggravated obstruction of justice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Red so weiter und du wirst wegen Widerstands gegen die Staatsgewalt angeklagt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Continue 95p d959blat959rer tes idioties, et je te ferai juger pour entrave 95p la justice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I were you, I'd be thinking about what I would tell my parents about this.

95
8 ta place, je r959fl959chirais un peu 95p ce que mes parents diraient de tout 95wa.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hic...
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Schluck*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you can't call my parents... That's unfair...

records.m_Talk_FRA: V-Vous ne pouvez pas le dire 95p mes parents... C'est pas juste...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I'll leave the rest to you.

records.m_Talk_FRA: La suite d959pend de toi.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excellent work, Lieutenant. This ended with no additional casualties, all thanks to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're just being nice. What I can do is use silly tricks to make petty, naive criminals look foolish. That's as far as I'll go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Zu freundlich von Ihnen. Ich w9588rde sagen, ich bin nur ganz gut darin, naive, biedere Kriminelle dumm aussehen zu lassen.

records.m_Talk_DEU: E-Ernsthaft?
records.m_Talk_FRA: V-Vraiment94p?
